# Runtime Layout

## Why this file exists
To clarify which files are runtime artifacts versus manuscript assets.

## Runtime Artifacts (generated by scripts)
- `.state/write_gate.json`
- `.state/lit_sync_preview.json`
- `.state/load_cache.json`
- `.state/reports/lit_sync_*.json`
- `backups/literature_sync/lit_sync_*/`

## Source Files (maintained by skill)
- `scripts/state_manager.py`
- `scripts/citation_guard.py`
- `SKILL.md`
- `scripts/config_manager.py`
- `configs/*.json`
- `QUICK_REFERENCE.md`
- `CHANGELOG.md`
- `tests/test_state_manager.py`
- `tests/test_citation_guard.py`

## Manuscript Project Files (outside skill root)
Your actual paper workspace should contain:
- `project_config.json`
- `storyline.json`
- `writing_progress.json`
- `context_memory.md`
- `literature_index.json`
- `figures_database.json`
- `si_database.json`
- `manuscripts/*.md`

The skill folder is tooling; your paper content should live in your manuscript project path.
